overall.description: Gameplay footage from Ghost of Tsushima showing a samurai warrior walking through an autumn forest at sunset, emerging onto coastal cliffs overlooking the ocean. The character explores the 'Shattered Cliffs' location with dramatic golden hour lighting and vibrant red foliage.

scene_state.functional_zone: autumn forest trail with red foliage

agents.ego_description: samurai warrior walking steadily through the autumn forest toward the coastline, with sunlight filtering through the trees

entered.detail: tall trees with orange and red autumn foliage lining the path
thick carpet of red and orange leaves covering the forest floor
large boulders and rock formations visible through the trees ahead
bright orange sun low on the horizon casting long shadows through the forest

segments.scene_description: The samurai walks through a dense autumn forest with vibrant red leaves covering the ground. Tall trees with orange foliage frame the path as the character moves toward a bright opening where the sun is setting.

events.description: character emerges from forest onto rocky cliff edge revealing expansive ocean view

agents.ego_description: carefully walking along the narrow white cliff edge overlooking the crashing waves below

entered.detail: pale yellow and white weathered rock formations forming the cliff edge
vast expanse of dark blue ocean with turquoise near the shore
white foam waves breaking against the rocks below the cliff
scattered rock outcroppings and sea stacks visible in the water

segments.scene_description: The character emerges from the forest onto the 'Shattered Cliffs' - a dramatic coastal overlook with white rocks and crashing waves. The ocean stretches to the horizon as the sun sets directly ahead, casting a golden path across the water.

events.description: character stops walking and stands still at the cliff edge to observe the view
character turns around 180 degrees to face back toward the forest

agents.ego_description: standing motionless on the cliff edge gazing at the sunset over the ocean, then turning to survey the forest behind

entered.detail: dense forest with red and orange foliage now visible behind the character after turning

segments.scene_description: The samurai stands still on the cliff edge, silhouetted against the brilliant sunset over the ocean. After a moment of observation, the character turns around to face the autumn forest, revealing the dense woodland that was previously behind.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from the depths of a vibrant autumn forest out toward a dramatic coastal precipice at sunset. It begins with the samurai walking through a dense woodland where red leaves carpet the ground and orange foliage frames the path toward a bright opening. As the character emerges from the trees, the scene expands onto the Shattered Cliffs, revealing white rocks and crashing waves beneath a sun that casts a golden path across the horizon. The camera then lingers on the samurai as a silhouette against the brilliant ocean light before turning around to face the dense autumn forest from which he just arrived.
